content:
Shelly didnt sleep most of the night and was constantly worried about something. She wasnt talking to herself for the most part unlike previous night but was very anxious and restless.
Then today morning she wasnt able to focus on life things e.g. taking care of herself, house and didnt utter a word with our daugther Avi. Also she mentioned that she is hearing voices, then she asked me if neighbor is telling us anything? To which i told her neighbors are not talking at all. Its all quiet. I pushed her to play outside in the backyard with us but she wasnt able to focus.

At around noon, she had tea and biscuits. Later i asked her to take a nap which she tried but not very successful. She is telling me that I dont want to leave you, will something bad happen cos of me?

Something about May 29 - Appointment with Dr. Beeta Verma

Some accusations were made that made me start the journal as I dont feel comfortable with her being my wife's doctor. What i understand of the doctor is they should ask patience or their kins before making judgment but during yday's appointment she made some comments and accusations that have drove me to find my own psychiatrist and get some help. For instances -

  1. She told me that i have anger management issues, should take serotonin medication

  2. She also thought
